task_completion.description: The agent opened the source document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open showing the document 'SOP_805_Sterilization.odt' with the initial static header 'Title: Steam Sterilization Protocol | Doc #: SOP-805 | Rev: 1.0'.

task_completion.description: The agent set the document Title property.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Document Properties dialog (e.g., File > Properties > Description tab) is visible with the Title field explicitly set to 'Steam Sterilization Protocol'.

task_completion.description: The agent added the required custom properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Document Properties dialog (e.g., Custom Properties tab) is visible showing two new properties: 'DocNumber' set to 'SOP-805-V2' and 'Revision' set to '2.0'.

task_completion.description: The agent inserted dynamic fields into the document header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the Fields dialog (e.g., Insert > Field > More Fields) to insert the Title, DocNumber, and Revision fields into the header area.

task_completion.description: The header is formatted correctly with the dynamic fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document header displays exactly 'Title: Steam Sterilization Protocol | Doc #: SOP-805-V2 | Rev: 2.0'. The dynamic values should ideally show field shading (a gray background highlight) indicating they are fields, not static text.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the updated document to the correct output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the filename 'SOP_805_Automated.odt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or the application title bar updates to show 'SOP_805_Automated.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with LibreOffice Writer or a similar GUI application. The agent should not be using terminal commands, Python scripts, or text editors to manually manipulate the ODT archive's XML files.

integrity.description: The agent inserted actual dynamic fields rather than typing static text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of the 'Insert Field' dialogs. In the final document, the inserted values ('Steam Sterilization Protocol', 'SOP-805-V2', '2.0') should have field shading (typically a gray background behind the text in LibreOffice) distinguishing them from the static text like 'Title:' or 'Doc #:'.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter the body of the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main body text of the SOP document should remain unchanged; all edits should be restricted to the Document Properties and the Header area.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source document is located at /home/ga/Documents/SOP_805_Sterilization.odt. The document Title must be set to 'Steam Sterilization Protocol'. Two custom properties must be created: 'DocNumber' with value 'SOP-805-V2' and 'Revision' with value '2.0'. The header must be updated to use these dynamic fields, resulting in the exact text 'Title: Steam Sterilization Protocol | Doc #: SOP-805-V2 | Rev: 2.0'. The final document must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SOP_805_Automated.odt.
